title: Darwinia macrostegia
taxonomy: Darwinia macrostegia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the southwestern part of Western Australia. As a member of the Myrtaceae family, Darwinia macrostegia is closely related to other species such as the eucalyptus and the clove tree. The genus Darwinia itself is a group of flowering plants that are endemic to Western Australia. Darwinia macrostegia is often found in a variety of habitats, including sandplains and woodlands.
